mapper.select: SELECT FROM deal d JOIN shop s ON s.id=d.shop_id WHERE d.id=#{dealId} AND d.merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND d.region=#{region} AND d.is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT id,deal_id,name,quantity,price,sort FROM deal_item WHERE deal_id=#{dealId} ORDER BY sort,id
mapper.update: UPDATE deal SET shop_id=#{shopId},type=#{type},title=#{title},cover_image=#{coverImage},price=#{price}, original_price=#{originalPrice},currency=#{currency},stock=#{stock},valid_start=#{validStart}, valid_end=#{validEnd},rules=#{rules},audit_status=0,status=0,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE

UPDATE deal SET status=#{status},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{dealId} AND merchant_id=#{merchantId} AND region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE AND (#{status}=0 OR (audit_status=1 AND stock<>0 AND (valid_start IS NULL OR valid_start<=CURRENT_DATE) AND (valid_end IS NULL OR valid_end>=CURRENT_DATE)))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `order` WHERE deal_id=#{dealId} AND pay_status IN (1,2,3)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `order` o JOIN deal d ON d.id=o.deal_id JOIN shop s ON s.id=o.shop_id

SELECT FROM `order` o JOIN deal d ON d.id=o.deal_id JOIN shop s ON s.id=o.shop_id
ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id,order_id,coupon_id,amount,reason,status,audit_by,audit_reason,audited_at,created_at,updated_at FROM refund WHERE order_id=#{orderId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE refund SET status=1,audit_by=#{operatorId},audit_reason=#{reason},audited_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND status=0
UPDATE refund SET status=2,audit_by=#{operatorId},audit_reason=#{reason},audited_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND status=0
UPDATE `order` SET pay_status=2,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{orderId} AND pay_status=1 AND status=1
UPDATE coupon SET status=4 WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND status=1

UPDATE deal SET stock=CASE WHEN stock=-1 THEN -1 ELSE stock+#{quantity} END, sold_count=CASE WHEN sold_count>=#{quantity} THEN sold_count-#{quantity} ELSE 0 END, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{dealId}
